channel.title: Kathirvel S — Software Developer
channel.description: Portfolio and projects by Kathirvel S, Software Developer specializing in MERN Stack and React Native.

item.title: AI-Course Generator
item.description: An AI-Powered Course Generator using Next.js, Gemini AI, PostgreSQL, and Drizzle ORM.

item.title: AI Diet Planner
item.description: Cross-platform mobile app for meal planning with AI-powered food recommendations.

item.title: Hospital Resource Optimization
item.description: PEC Techathon 3.0 Winner — AI-powered hospital resource prediction dashboard.
